items.caption: A retail kiosk for 'A Seventh Sense Botanical Therapy' selling CBD beauty products in a mall. The kiosk features a large display window with a mannequin and a woman shopping inside.

A modern food kiosk designed for an event booth in a mall. the kiosk features a sleek, contemporary aesthetic with a wooden structure and a glass countertop. the interior is well-lit, highlighting the clean lines and minimalist design. the kiosk is situated in a spacious area with other shops and a high ceiling, suggesting a bustling retail environment. the image also contains text overlaying the design, indicating that it is a portfolio piece for a design company, showcasing their work in creating such kiosks.
a large video game located in a mall
a clothing store inside of a mall.
